name: PR Scan - Detects suspicious patterns in cheating-style PR
description: After mock login, scan a public PR that contains test-skipping or empty catch patterns, and verify that Mantiz flags it with a Trust Score below 70 and shows at least one finding.

planSteps.description: The PR Scan form with a URL input field is visible — the user is logged in
In the PR URL input field, type: https://github.com/facebook/react/pull/31611
Click the Scan or Analyze PR button
A Trust Score is shown in the results — the scan completed without a network error or crash
The results panel shows either the number of files scanned or a findings summary table — not a blank white area
